3.2.1.23.name: beta-galactosidase
3.2.1.23.reaction: Hydrolysis of terminal non-reducing beta-D-galactose residues in beta-D-galactosides

3.2.1.26.name: beta-fructofuranosidase
3.2.1.26.reaction: Hydrolysis of terminal non-reducing beta-D-fructofuranoside residues in beta-D-fructofuranosides

3.2.1.20.name: alpha-glucosidase
3.2.1.20.reaction: Hydrolysis of terminal (1->4)-linked alpha-D-glucose residues from the non-reducing ends of oligosaccharides with release of alpha-D-glucose

3.2.1.2.name: beta-amylase
3.2.1.2.reaction: Hydrolysis of (1->4)-alpha-D-glucosidic linkages in polysaccharides so as to remove successive maltose units from the non-reducing ends of the chains

3.2.1.1.name: alpha-amylase
3.2.1.1.reaction: Endohydrolysis of (1->4)-alpha-D-glucosidic linkages in polysaccharides containing three or more (1->4)-alpha-linked D-glucose units

3.2.1.4.name: cellulase
3.2.1.4.reaction: Endohydrolysis of (1->4)-beta-D-glucosidic linkages in cellulose, lichenin and cereal beta-D-glucans
